turns.source_text: I want to be with someone but no one wants to be with me
turns.user_message: I feel like the people around me are slowly moving on without me. I'm just kind of standing still while everyone drifts away.
I realized I haven't had a real conversation with any of my close friends in weeks. Nobody's reaching out anymore.
I scrolled through my contacts yesterday and couldn't think of a single person I could actually call right now. That hit me pretty hard.
